name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
Chocolate chips should be the Little Bits chocolate Chips and they
Butter is to be melted and then cooled to room temperature.
~--------------------------------------------------------------------------
In a large bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1 cup of Little Bits chocolate chips and butter, mix well. Pat firmly into 9-inch springform pan, covering bottom and 2 1/2-inches up sides. Set aside.
In a small saucepan, combine milk and instant coffee, sprinkle gelatin on top. Set aside for 1 minute. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until gelatin and coffee dissolve. Set aside. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until creamy. Beat in sweetened condensed milk and gelatin mixture. Fold in whipped cream and remaining 1 cup of Little Bits chocolate chips. Pour into prepared pan. Chill until firm (about 2 hours).
Run knife around edge of cake to separate from pan, remove rim.
Makes 1 9-inch Cheesecake
